posts.author: Sofi (Sofia Peña)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have a board connecting several boards to see critical information in one place. We would like to create reports using Monday widgets that connect this information. However, the widgets do not allows us to select/filter the mirrored columns.

Tested with mumbers, cards,

What are you trying to achieve

Use mirror columns in a board to create accurate reports.
